caption: A woman with shoulder-length dark hair and black-rimmed glasses is centered against a solid dark gray background. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved tunic with a decorative red and blue floral embroidery pattern along the neckline and a small dark necklace. A thin black lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her shirt. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and gesturing with her hands. In the beginning, her hands are held low and close to her chest. As she continues to speak, she raises her hands slightly, moving them in a rhythmic motion to emphasize her points, with her fingers spread and palms facing inward. A small circular logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible in the lower corner of each frame. The background remains static and empty, focusing entirely on the woman's upper body and her expressive communication.
